name: taproot
description: AI-driven specs, enforced at commit time. Code without traceability doesn't merge.

walkthroughs.title: Get Started with Taproot
walkthroughs.description: Set up requirements-driven development in your AI-assisted project.

steps.title: Initialize taproot in your project
steps.description:
Add the taproot requirement hierarchy to your project. This creates the `taproot/` folder and configures your AI coding agent.

[Initialize Project](command:taproot.init)
